title: 3.3 Advanced SMCP
message: Advanced SMCP (Sequential Motive Control Protection) — calculated parameters. Values are derived from TOTC and pilot gas polynomials.

rows.label: Pilot gas split ratio at idle
rows.desc: Pilot gas split ratio at idle

rows.label: Pilot gas split ratio at BL
rows.desc: Pilot gas split ratio at BL

sections.note: These values are computed by the T3000 controller from the polynomials on sheets SG121 and SG122.
